sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17157" key="a)to/ru<nh>tos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀτόρῡ[νη]τος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17157.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not stirred wity a ladle,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4:9:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
